depends_on.reason: Outbound dispatch requires active, ready, non-revoked material package and manifest.
Dispatch and return windows depend on exam slot schedule and assignments.
Expected answer-sheet counts come from locked roster context.
School must be active and not blocked/suspended.
Courier actions depend on logistics role and scope.
Late delivery, return, receipt and mismatch tasks are created.
Shipment, return and exception notifications are sent through notification ops.
Critical incidents and sensitive exports require audit/security review.

provides: dispatch, shipment, return, receipt, mismatch and incident KPIs
received answer-sheet shipments and intake handoff counts
logistics exception status that may affect result readiness
courier, dispatch, return, receipt, mismatch and SLA reports
